semantic.role: Core TypeScript interface defining the contract for accessing supported configuration values within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the type-safe interface for retrieving all user-configurable system parameters.
Centralizes the configuration access signature, ensuring consistency across config consumers.
Documents the available configuration options through method names (e.g., LLM settings, validation policies, hook modes).
outOfScope: Implementing configuration retrieval logic or storing values.
Acting as an infrastructure facade or module.
invariants: Must remain a pure TypeScript interface without implementation.
Must import only type definitions, not runtime modules.
Must define getter methods that return configuration values or undefined.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, type-safe contract for configuration access to decouple consumers from implementation details.

English.role: Core TypeScript interface defining the contract for accessing supported configuration values within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the type-safe interface for retrieving all user-configurable system parameters.
Centralizes the configuration access signature, ensuring consistency across config consumers.
Documents the available configuration options through method names (e.g., LLM settings, validation policies, hook modes).
outOfScope: Implementing configuration retrieval logic or storing values.
Acting as an infrastructure facade or module.

exports.name: setSupportedValue
exports.signature:
setSupportedValue(
  access: ConfigSupportedValueAccess,
  key: SupportedConfigKey,
  value: unknown,
)
